overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting under elevated highway overpasses in the shadowy lower city and emerging into a neon-lit commercial district at dusk. The camera follows a pedestrian in a red jacket through winding streets beneath massive concrete infrastructure, transitioning from dark sheltered walkways to open streets with Japanese-inspired architecture and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with pedestrian walkway

events.description: passes underneath the Delamain corporate sign hanging from overpass
futuristic sedan passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, following a pedestrian in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead at steady pace, leading the way through the underpass

entered.detail: large rectangular corporate sign with 'DELAMAIN' text suspended from the overpass structure
massive concrete highway structure casting deep shadows over the street below
tall modern building with green-tinted glass facade visible between overpass supports
corrugated metal fencing running along the right side of the pedestrian walkway
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging near a building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city, with the camera walking along a concrete sidewalk. A prominent 'DELAMAIN' sign hangs overhead before passing out of view. The environment is dark and sheltered, with a green glass building visible to the left and metal barriers on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian in a red jacket while futuristic vehicles pass on the road to the left.

events.description: path curves gently to the left following the road bend
approaching brighter area ahead as the covered walkway opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the pedestrian in red while navigating the curving path under the highway

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the road to the left

entered.detail: reflective yellow directional arrows mounted on the curb indicating the road curve
tall metal pole with traffic signals and electrical equipment
overhead street lamp illuminating the shaded walkway

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves left beneath the highway infrastructure, with yellow chevron signs marking the road bend. The environment remains dark and enclosed, though a brighter exit becomes visible in the distance. Utility poles and street lights appear along the path while the green building remains visible on the left. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional covered walkway with industrial scaffolding

events.description: emerging from deep shadow of overpass into area with visible sky and neon lighting ahead
natural dusk light becomes visible ahead while neon signs illuminate the right side

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright opening ahead, closing distance on the pedestrian in red

entered.detail: industrial metal scaffolding and corrugated barriers lining the right side of the walkway
large illuminated advertising screens glowing with cyan and orange light in the distance
dense network of electrical and data cables crisscrossing between poles and buildings
tall vertical digital advertisement display showing cyan-colored graphics

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from the enclosed overpass to a semi-covered walkway with industrial metal scaffolding on the right. Bright neon billboards become visible in the distance, signaling the approach to a commercial district. Overhead wires crisscross the space, and the lighting shifts from artificial to a mix of natural dusk and neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with Japanese-inspired architecture and neon signage

events.description: fully emerges from underpass into open street with visible sky and traditional Japanese gate structure
passing by a street vendor stall with traditional red lanterns and illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the open commercial street, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: the pedestrian in red continues walking ahead, now joined by other pedestrians in the distance

entered.detail: traditional wooden gate structure with curved roof tiles and red paper lanterns marking a shop entrance
tall vertical digital billboard displaying cyan-colored advertisements with Asian characters
small outdoor food stall with illuminated menu displays and traditional architectural elements
massive futuristic skyscraper with red warning lights visible against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vibrant commercial street at dusk, with the sky fully visible above. Traditional Japanese architectural elements, including a wooden gate with red lanterns, contrast with futuristic neon signs and digital billboards. The camera walks past street vendors and other pedestrians while towering skyscrapers rise in the distance, fully emerging from the shadowy underpass into the illuminated city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowy depths of a concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, following a pedestrian in a red jacket past a Delamain sign and a green glass building while vehicles stream by on an adjacent road. As the walkway curves left through the dark, enclosed infrastructure, the camera tracks toward a brightening exit marked by yellow chevron signs and utility poles. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered area of industrial scaffolding and crisscrossing overhead wires, where the dim artificial light begins to blend with the glow of distant neon billboards. Finally, the camera emerges fully into the open air of a bustling street at dusk, passing red lanterns and traditional Japanese gates beneath a sky framed by towering skyscrapers and digital advertisements.
